Groww Arbitrage Fund Direct Growth - NAV, Mutual Fund Performance & Portfolio
Invest in stocks, ETFs, IPOs with fast orders. Track returns on your stock holdings and view real-time P&L on your positions.
Invest in direct mutual funds at zero charges via lump sump investments or SIPs

Returns on your systematic withdrawal plan
NAV: 27 Oct '23

Annualised returns
Average of the yearly returns of a mutual fund over a given period.
Absolute returns
The total return of a mutual fund over a given period.
Returns and rankings
Annualised returns
Absolute returns
Fund returns
Expense ratio
A fee payable to a mutual fund house for managing your mutual fund investments.     It is the total percentage of a company's fund assets used for administrative, management, advertising, and other expenses.
A percentage of your capital gains payable to the government upon exiting your mutual fund investments.     Taxation is categorized as long-term capital gains (LTCG) and short-term capital gains (STCG) depending on your holding period and the type of fund.
A fee payable to a mutual fund house for exiting a fund (fully or partially) before the completion of a specified period from the date of investment.
Exit load of 025% if redeemed within 1 month
Exit load of 0.25% if redeemed within 1 month
Exit load of 0.50% if redeemed within 3 months.
Exit load, stamp duty and tax
Exit load of 025% if redeemed within 1 month
Stamp duty on investment: 0.005% (from July 1st, 2020)
Returns are taxed at 20%, if you redeem before one year. After 1 year, you are required to pay LTCG tax of 12.5% on returns of Rs 1.25 lakh+ in a financial year.
Groww Arbitrage Fund Direct Growth is a Hybrid Mutual Fund Scheme launched by Groww Mutual Fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 10 Apr 2008.  The fund currently has an Asset Under Management(AUM) of ₹4,262 Cr and the Latest NAV as of 27 Oct 2023 is ₹16.39.
Groww Arbitrage Fund Direct Growth is a Hybrid Mutual Fund Scheme launched by Groww Mutual Fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 10 Apr 2008.  The fund currently has an Asset Under Management(AUM) of ₹4,262 Cr and the Latest NAV as of 27 Oct 2023 is ₹16.39.
The Groww Arbitrage Fund Direct Growth is rated Low risk. Minimum SIP Investment is set to ₹500.  Exit load of 025% if redeemed within 1 month

What kind of returns does Groww Arbitrage Fund Direct Growth provide?
The Groww Arbitrage Fund Direct Growth has been there from 19 Dec 2014 and the average annual returns provided by this fund is 5.74% since its inception.
